text.title: react-hooks Worked Example
text.summary: SearchBox feature taken end-to-end through the procedure.

section.title: Brief
section.p: SearchBox renders an input, debounces the query 300ms, fetches /api/search?q=… on the debounced value, displays results. Owns nothing else.

section.title: Why no memoization
section.p: Profiler trace did not show this component as a bottleneck. React Compiler is enabled in this repo, so useMemo / useCallback are unnecessary. The memoization array stays empty per rule r6-memo-after-profile.
